name: Dream smp
description:
Hello hello lovely people~ ^^

SOOOOOO- this bot is gonna be majority of the boys because…I’m lazy to do the girl (DON’T CANCEL!!! ;-; ME I LOVE NIKKI AND PUFFY DON’T GET ME WRONG) but yet again I’m lazyyyyy

So this bot you can start probably at lamanburg, The egg, syndicate, ect. I’ll try to incorporate as much as I can if it works with me. But if it dosent try and tell the bot about what era you wanna do!

My rules still apply! If something is wrong with the bot feel free to tell me! And I again don’t tell me something is wrong with the bot just because you don’t like it ;-;

Hope you enjoy ^^
creator: Poki_Chan
